founder_order: 2026-07-23: founder showed Telegram flooded with raw machine events ('just buzzword with zero proof') and demanded outcomes in plain language
root_cause: NOETFIELD-RUNWAY services/telegram-cockpit relayed EVERY completed workflow run on EVERY branch to the founder chat verbatim (codename + branch + status + link) — 9 messages in 5 minutes, all machine detail, violating the founder language law

behavior: work-branch events, skips, cancellations: silent (machine lanes own their own noise)
live-line (main) failure: ONE plain-language message with proof link
live-line recovery: ONE plain-language message (red/green state kept in KV)
merged-to-main changes: ONE 'change landed' message; openings/drafts silent
known workflow codenames translated to plain words; unknown names humanized
founder-report pipeline added: any machine lane can push a plain-language outcome report to the founder's Telegram; a jargon guard rejects code tags and branch names at the door

first_outcome_report: dispatched via founder-report run 30005368450 (today's digest: noise stopped, 3 security holes closed, daily money counter live, no-invented-gates law)

v2_correction.observed: v1 stopped the jargon relay (last old-format message 5:02 AM, single webhook confirmed — no duplicate sender) but still flooded: every merged PR announced in real time (7 messages in 12 min) and repeat failures re-alarmed per run
behavior: merged PRs: silent — accumulated in KV landed_today, shown as a count in the cockpit panel
failures: speak once per workflow, then silent until recovery (crashloop = 1 message)
global ceiling: max 4 founder messages/hour, overflow counted for digests

v3_founder_calibration.founder_order: 'keep them back! those are mine to watch and see' — landed-change messages are founder news
v3_founder_calibration.behavior: merged-to-main announcements restored in real time; 4/hr ceiling removed; kept: work-branch/skip silence, plain names, failure-speaks-once-until-recovery

staging_break_diagnosis_20260723.finding: all release gates passed; the deploy step failed instantly with Railway 'Unauthorized' — the RAILWAY_TOKEN repo secret is expired/invalid
staging_break_diagnosis_20260723.classification: LEGIT FOUNDER GATE (credential) per ssot/FOUNDER_GATE_SCOPE_v1.md — the machine cannot and must not mint or move credentials
staging_break_diagnosis_20260723.impact: staging copy of the heavy executor stays on its previous version; everything else green; cockpit will auto-announce recovery when the workflow next passes

law: ssot/FOUNDER_GATE_SCOPE_v1.md (founder-facing text: plain language, outcomes only)
